title: Lead Frontend Developer at Tata Consultancy Services Consulting Pvt Ltd
company: Tata Consultancy Services Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Lead Frontend Developer at Tata Consultancy Services Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
Tata Consultancy Services Consulting Pvt Ltd has an exciting opening for a Frontend Developer at our Pimpri-Chinchwad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Tata Consultancy Services Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Tata Consultancy Services Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Kubernetes

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata Consultancy Services Consulting Pvt Ltd!
